books.title: Poor Folk
books.author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
books.summary: Two poor Russian people exchange letters of love, hope and fear.

books.title: The Last of the Mohicans
books.author: James Fenimore Cooper
books.summary: Frontiersmen and Native Americans help transport a colonel’s daughters through upper New York during the French and Indian War.

books.title: My Reminiscences
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Autobiographical sketches from the Bengali writer, poet, and artist Rabindranath Tagore.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: A Little Princess
books.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
books.summary: A young girl discovers a life of unexpected challenges when she goes to live at a London boarding school.

books.title: Manalive
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: An eccentric man brings chaos and happiness to a house of litigious lodgers.

books.title: Ghosts
books.author: Henrik Ibsen
books.summary: A Norwegian sea captain’s widow who, no matter how much she tries, cannot escape the ghosts of the past.

books.title: At the Back of the North Wind
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A young boy’s life is transformed by his visit to the country at the back of the north wind.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Voltairine de Cleyre
books.summary: A collection of all of the short stories written by Voltairine de Cleyre.

books.title: The Magician
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A young engaged couple meet a mysterious man who claims to have practical knowledge of the occult.

books.title: The Hashish Eater
books.author: Fitz Hugh Ludlow
books.summary: A philosophical contemplation of youthful adventures spent ingesting large doses of psychoactive cannabis extract.

books.title: The Murder on the Links
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A famous Belgian detective and his sidekick are summoned to France to investigate the mysterious murder of a rich businessman.

books.title: The English Constitution
books.author: Walter Bagehot
books.summary: The nature and operation of British governance in the Victorian era is explained.

books.title: Tao Te Ching
books.author: Laozi
books.summary: One of the fundamental texts of the Tao philosophy and religion.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A collection of poems by Ring Lardner.

books.title: Those Barren Leaves
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: An aristocrat summons a group of “intelligentsia” to vacation in her Italian mansion.

books.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: Prompted by a mysterious Icelandic manuscript, a professor and his nephew, with the aid of a local guide, adventure to the center of the earth through the crater of a dormant volcano.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Tanizaki Jun’ichirō
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Tanizaki Jun’ichirō, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: Polynesian Mythology
books.author: George Grey
books.summary: A collection of Māori mythology covering the start of the universe through to the spread of Māori tribes through New Zealand’s North Island.

books.title: The Path to Rome
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc takes a walking pilgrimage to Rome from his hometown in France, writing of the journey, sketching the sights, and digressing on a wide variety of subjects.
